title: My Son And His Wife Forged My Signature, Took $200K And Vanished. So I Foreclosed On Their Home.
description: After they forged my signature on a quitclaim deed and sold the duplex I bought with my pension, I thought I'd lost everything. Seven years later, I found their new house on social media and took them to court. Now their dream home is my vacation rental funding my retirement. #RevengeStory #FamilyBetrayal #JusticeServed
thumb_text: THEY FORGED MY SIGNATURE, SO I FORECLOSED ON THEIR HOME

thumb_lines.text: I BOUGHT THAT DUPLEX WITH MY HUSBAND'S PENSION
7 YEARS LATER, THE COURT PROVED FRAUD
AND I FORECLOSED ON THEIR NEW HOUSE
